title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Compass Group India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Compass Group India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Compass Group India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Compass Group India:
Compass Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India!
